name: R-9 token id naming follows category.role.variant convention per the §26 schema
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/design-tokens/registry.yaml","utf8");const ids=(y.match(/^  - id: \S+/mg)||[]).map(s=>s.replace(/^  - id: /,""));const cats=new Set(["color","space","font","radius","shadow","motion","breakpoint"]);process.exit(ids.every(id=>cats.has(id.split(".")[0]))?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
